mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM chat_session_member m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT m.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM chat_session_member m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} AND m.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_member(session_id, user_id, unread_count) VALUES(#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{unreadCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session_member SET unread_count = #{count} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE chat_session_member SET unread_count = unread_count + 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id != #{excludeUserId}
UPDATE chat_session_member SET unread_count = 0, last_read_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
